summary: Created agent framework documentation (FIELD_MANUAL.md) in t27 repo instead of trinity

mistake.why: No repo_policy.json, no tri git guard, no context of repo role
mistake.consequence: Misplaced files, broken cross-repo links, no episode tracking

architectural: Implement tri git guard to block forbidden paths/patterns
Use tri cell protocol for any repo changes with begin/checkpoint/verdict/seal

Save this episode as toxic with MNL pattern

mnl.mistake: Wrote to wrong repo (t27) without repo_policy validation
